published.descriptionOfRequirement:
P00017:
1. OBLIGATES AND REALIGNS SLIN FUNDING
2. UPDATES THE SLIN 0006AG DESCRIPTION
3. ESTABLISHES INSPECTION AND ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA
4. ESTABLISHES POPS AND DELIVERY DATES
6. UPDATES NAVSEA TEXT G-242-H001
7. UPDATES ATTACHMENT J-12.

primeNaics.description: 334511 -- Search, Detection, Navigation, Guidance, Aeronautical, and Nautical System and Instrument Manufacturing

published.descriptionOfRequirement:
P00014: 
1.) ESTABLISHES, FUNDS, AND REALIGNS SLINS
2.) ESTABLISH INSPECTION AND ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA FOR NEW SLINS
3.) ESTABLISH POPS AND DELIVERY DATES FOR NEW SLINS
4.) OBLIGATE AND REALIGN SLINS.

ACCORDINGLY, THE CONTRACT IS MODIFIED AS FOLLOWS:
